reviews.review_msg: She's a kind and approachable professor, but her exams are quite difficult, and the way she structures her questions can be confusing or unclear. Overall, I'd rate her 2.5 out of 5.

She is my favorite professor! I won't say her exams are easy, but if you look through the assignments and practice questions that she uploads, review the lecture materials, and ask her questions during office hours, you will be prepared!
The professor is great, willing to help my grade and give me a chance and is patient, if you study hard she will provide you with good marks.
I've never seen a professor write the wrong answers on exam solutions and then refuse to correct them

Jiamin is the worst econ professor I have encountered in my life. She is very tough grader. You can't even write the answers which are correct but not on her notes, so just try to gulp down everything she teaches. Also her papers are pretty tough and she tries to prove herself correct every time.
She made me stay one more term at FIC............
Oh my god! She gave me a first F in my study journey. I even passes Steve's 251 last term. I hate her!!!!
Guys, stay away from her. RUN!!!
Omg, so horrible.....
Too hard Instructor, come one, 100 level course!
I've never seen a professor like this. Year 1 class even harder than year 3, Jiamin, what are you doing?
If you wanna try the hardest exams that you've never seen, go to her class and you will see. Good luck in ECON105. Oh sorry, good luck in her classes.
The worst instructor I had in all terms at FIC...
It was my first ECON course, so studying was challenging. Her exams were tough!!! However, she's a super good professor and greatly supported my class.

Jiamin Liu is one of the best teachers I have ever had in my education. She is really caring and willing to help students with their problems and her lectures are really AMAZING. Lastly, all you need to learn well in this course is DOING HOMEWORK.
I want other students to know that she is THE AMAZING teacher i ever had, I genuinely love her so much, she also helps so much through the semester.

She rushes through course material and does not pay attention to any students needs. She blames students for not doing well when she doesn't even prepare us for any of our exams. Don't take this class.
Relatively easy material but boring classes. Also not accommodating at all. The online method of giving exams is super inconvenient.

She is very easy going in weekly lectures. Quizzes to some extent are okay but some of them can be very difficult. But her exams are very tough. Some of the questions weren't even mentioned/discussed in lectures and were extremely hard. If you are an average student DO NOT CHOOSE her as it is very hard to pass

Jiamin Liu makes sure that you won't pass her class. She makes it seem like the class is easy with her happy-go-lucky weekly quizzes but her exams are really, really hard. She'll make you regret choosing Econ as a subject to study, so do stay away.
Here online exams were hard as we were not allowed to write and scan

This is my second Jiamin's course because I attended Jiamin's ECON105 firstly. Jiamin is a very careful and excellent person, which can be seen from her well-prepared class notes, quizzes, and exams. I really cannot understand why so many people recognize that Jiamin's purpose is to let students fail. Don't trust that! Jiamin is really nice!!!
Her lectures and homework in class are pretty easy and understandable. However, her exam is extremely hard. It is like you calculate 1+1 in class but in the exam, it is something crazy.

About Jiamin, I have to say. She is the best teacher I have ever had in my education. She is very patient, very gentle, very serious. I listened to her ECON105 twice per week, and I certainly participated in her tutorial every week. No doubt, I will also take her microeconomics class, because I like her teaching style.

She just wants her students to fail. makes really tough mids and final paper. however, she is a great lecturer. Do not Choose her if you are an average student because her question paper is simply hard and she doesn't even scale grades

Jiamin gives 3 pop quizzes throughout the semester, so make sure you study at home and don't be late for lectures. She is always willing to answer students' question. However, there was content that I didn't understand and her explanation just couldn't clear the confusion up. Midterms were rather hard, the average of mt2 was 48%.
I have to say that she is making this course way harder. Terrible questions in the exam and if u wanna a good mark just dont choose her
Tough grader, not an easy course
Worst teacher I have ever seen. Please leave teaching economics if you ever want to see the students happy.
She is nice. Welcome back!
hard teacher

She is a really nice professor with clear and logical explanation. However, her exams were extremely difficult. You have to deduce the answer by applying the concepts from her notes. It is noted that  the concepts in her notes  are on the tests as the exam areas. Your textbook is only for the additional knowledge to help you understand.
I took ECON105 as elective subject, and after her course I want to have a minor in economy

Her lecture is very clear, her teaching style is very logical. However, exams are not very related to the lecture and notes. Even if you know everything she said, you know everything from the notes and MCQ questions, you may get 40% on exams.

Jiamin is well-organized and clear about what she's teaching! Although lectures are boring but i actually learn ALOT for her. Do the tutorial Qs and go to her or TA's office hour--that's how you learn. Exams are ok long as you study you'll be fine.

The course is getting harder and harder in the later of the semester. Midterm is fair. Yet, the final is really hard, I was working until the last minutes. The prof is really nice though! She was running around answering questions during all exams. Also, sometimes she will add more information based the lecture notes. Will take again for sure!
She is a good teacher

Although it might seem that she's going to fast with the lecture for you to catch up, if you succeed in doing that and keep up-to-date with the weekly materials, then its really easy to get an A in this course.
The midterms are so difficult, some of the questions are not even be taught by the Prof, but she is expecting you know how to do it.

Lectures are based on the notes, which is not very interesting. But the explanations are quite clear and gives you direction for preparing exams.  Fair and easy exams, focus on the notes and you'll be fine.

Horrible teaching. 1) Fills in the blanks for her lectures for 2 hours, on pre printed lecture notes. 2) Doesn't reply to emails 3) Not helpful 4) Brutal Exams. Midterm 1  42% avg, Midterm 2  51% avg. Class size 56   5) Dumbest TA's I have ever had. Do NOT know how to mark or explain material. Her class makes you hate econ. Avoid her if you can.

All the notes are fill in the blank from the textbook. She doesnt teach it, she just fills in the blanks for the 1hr 30 mins of lecture, and talks about what she fills in. 1. Doesnt reply to emails, not helpful. 2. Can't teach 3. Brutal exams.. class avg overall was 59% for 30 students...
Not good. I did not understand anything in her lectures even I read the textbook before attending to class. she's helpful, yes but in one-one teaching only, in class, NO.

Don't like her teaching style, it is like reading the lecture notes. Her midterm is very different from what I expect. Once you didn't prove calculation steps, she will give you zero at that question. Even that's very simple questions, and even all your answers are right!

she is kind and very helpful but the way she explains is quite hard to understand clearly. The exam is fairly good and the final exam is EXTREMLY difficult , there were questions that you never seen before. However she's still a professional prof

She's a nice prof but I think she made the course harder this term - avg was only 50% for first midterm; course covers ALOT of material; TAs spoonfeed you everything (HOW IS THIS LEARNING?!) questions not encouraged. im disappointed.

Nice person and great teaching style. I took her ECON103 before,now Im taking her ECON291 at SFU,attending the lecture is recommanded cuase she gives almost all of the details on lecture notes,it would make your life much easier.

Nice person and great teaching style. I took her ECON103 at FIC yet,now Im taking her ECON291 at SFU,attending the lecture is recommanded cuase she gives almost all of the details on lecture notes,she would make your life much easier.
Her notes are easy to understand.She is sweet and helpful prof.
She is the best!

Indeed, the final exam is much harder than midterm and harder than what I ever expected. But she is a good teacher and this courses give grade on curve.  She is a nice guy and helpful. She just needs more teaching experience and Shes young.I hope she can give more realistic example like the one in final exam during the lecture.
Really helpful and knowledgable professor. Only examined what she taught and no surprise in exams.

No good, mdts appear to be easy compare to final exam. The final was extremely hard which only consists of 6 written questions. She gave Surrey students much easier version for all exams, that's so unfair. Do not like her! Strong accent!

Must attend lectures if you want to pass. Prof was nice but the lectures were very dry. Tutorials were horrible because the TA was very slow and uninteresting and seemed like he didn't want to be there at all. As a result, tutorial attendance was always bad. Overall, a very dry course.

Helpful teacher with clear and understandable english (but don't expect chocolate to the ears since she's not so great with words). Little to no textbook usage (has own notes). Good teaching speed, easy to follow.
damn good instructor! u should take courses with her! btw, nice guy!
she is a good teacher. clear explanation.

I didn't have her as a prof but had her as a tutor. She is extremely helpful. She explained 4 whole chapters in 2 hours and made them crystal clear for me when i was knowing nothing about Econ. a very nice and sweet person; loved her voice. I believe she would made a great prof too.
No Comments
very helpful instructor.
hot teacher, while not very easy to understand, she is extremely helpful and kind to students. I would definitely recommend her to anyone that is in FIC. =)
